title: 2 Pcs Christmas Magnolia Flower Branches 18.9" Artificial Magnolia Floral Picks and Spray with Pinecones Berries for Christmas Tree Decorations Vase Arrangements Centerpiece Xmas Decor, Pink Red
features: Festive Christmas Magnolia Design: These magnolia flower picks feature a stunning combination of a smooth magnolia flower with shining details, realistic evergreen pine branches, and natural-looking pinecones and berries. As magnolia christmas tree flowers, they bring a harmonious blend of floral elegance and rustic holiday charm, making them perfect for magnolia christmas decoration that stands out in any festive setup.

Generous Size for Versatile Styling: Each magnolia floral stem measures 18.9 inches (48 cm) in height, offering ample length to enhance various decor elements. Whether used as magnolia flower spray in wreaths, inserted into christmas magnolia branches for tree toppers, or arranged in vases as standalone accents, these picks provide flexibility to create stunning holiday displays.

High-Quality Materials: These magnolia flower picks are crafted as top-tier artificial decor, featuring silk magnolia leaves & greenery that boast a realistic texture, lace and smooth fabric magnolia petals for an elegant touch, genuine pinecones for rustic charm, and plastic pine branches for added fullness. The stems are made of hand-wrapped paper rolls, allowing you to bend and shape them freely to fit any decor arrangement.

Ideal for Multiple Christmas Decor Applications: These magnolia flower picks are versatile enough to be used in magnolia christmas tree flowers, woven into garlands, added to holiday centerpieces, or used as accents in wreaths. Their design seamlessly integrates into various magnolia christmas decoration themes, from traditional to modern festive styles.

Perfect Gift for Holiday Decor Enthusiasts: This set of christmas magnolia branches makes a thoughtful gift for anyone who loves creating beautiful holiday decor. Use them as magnolia flower picks in tree arrangements, as magnolia flower spray in wreaths, or as standalone magnolia christmas decoration—their versatility ensures they fit seamlessly into any magnolia christmas decor collection.
